author: doll-agent
content: Implemented histogram_bin_edges(a, bins, range) in ferray-stats::histogram. Returns just the bin-edge array without counting. For Bins::Edges, passes the explicit edges through (works on empty arrays); for Bins::Count, computes range from data unless explicitly supplied. Re-exported via ferray-stats lib.rs and umbrella ferray crate. 3 unit tests.
